# fit_rate_through_time { #tspaint.fit_rate_through_time }

```python
tspaint.fit_rate_through_time(
    ts,
    labels,
    edges=None,
    *,
    n_cells=40,
    n_iter=15,
    em_init=8,
    Q0=None,
    estimate_pi=False,
    soft_refs=None,
    n_knots=20,
    tol=0.0001,
    floor=1e-09,
    fit_result=None,
)
```

Fit the time-inhomogeneous directional admixture-rate-through-time profile by EM.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   

<code>[**labels**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Reference sample-node id -> ancestry state (0/1).

<code>[**edges**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array_like](`array_like`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Fine log-time grid edges (:func:`tspaint.dating.log_time_grid`). If ``None`` (default), a grid of ``n_cells`` log-spaced cells is built automatically from the node ages.

<code>[**n_cells**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [40]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of log-time cells when ``edges`` is auto-constructed (ignored if ``edges`` given).

<code>[**n_iter**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [15]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Maximum EM iterations.

<code>[**em_init**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [8]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Iterations of the homogeneous :func:`tspaint.fit` used to initialise (ignored when ``fit_result`` is supplied).

<code>[**n_knots**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [20]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Spline knots for the M-step.

<code>[**tol**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [0.0001]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Relative log-likelihood change for convergence.

<code>[**fit_result**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tspaint](`tspaint`).[em](`tspaint.em`).[FitResult](`tspaint.em.FitResult`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   A precomputed homogeneous fit to **warm-start** from (its ``Q`` seeds the rate splines and its ``w``/``pi`` build the tip emissions). When given, the internal homogeneous :func:`tspaint.fit` is skipped — used by :meth:`tspaint.Painting.rate_through_time` to reuse the painting's fit rather than refitting.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[RateThroughTime](`tspaint.dating.em.RateThroughTime`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:
